summary: Iteration 12: All requested features tested and working correctly. Backend APIs 100% pass rate, Frontend all features verified.

phishing_link_tracking.details: Tracking URL shows phishing landing page with 'Security Training Alert' and awareness content, NOT homepage

campaign_creation_flow.details: After selecting organization, target users appear correctly. Select All option available. Can select individual users.

edit_campaign_button.details: Edit button visible on draft and scheduled campaigns. Campaign update API works correctly.

duplicate_campaign.details: Duplicate button (copy icon) visible on all campaigns. Creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix. Opens edit dialog.

RichTextEditor_typing.details: Text types correctly left-to-right, NOT backwards. Fix verified - removed dangerouslySetInnerHTML on each render.

file_upload_template_creator.details: Image Library works without 'invalid token' error. Upload Image button functional. Existing images displayed correctly.

page_builder_under_content.details: Page Builder is correctly placed under Content section in sidebar. Content section items: CMS, Page Builder, Page Editor, Landing Page, Sidebar, Media Library

custom_pages_in_nav.details: Custom pages with show_in_nav=true appear in public navigation. 'Contact Us' page visible and navigable.

success_rate.backend: 100% (15 passed, 3 skipped due to fixture scope)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test campaigns: TEST_TRACKING_CAMPAIGN, TEST_Duplicate_Campaign (Copy)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration are working. Key verified fixes: 1) Phishing tracking shows landing page not homepage, 2) RichTextEditor doesn't type backwards, 3) File upload works without token errors, 4) Page Builder is under Content section, 5) Custom pages appear in public nav. Test credentials and tracking URL in test_credentials field.
